Interface Feature

All Known Subinterfaces:
ComponentStrategy, Strategy<Goal>
All Known Implementing Classes:

PurePosDPathFeature, QueryExpandCost, ReducibleMonomialsFeature, RuleSetDispatchFeature, ScaleFeature, SeqContainsExecutableCodeFeature, SetsSmallerThanFeature, ShannonFeature, SimpleFilteredStrategy, SimplifyBetaCandidateFeature, SimplifyTermStrategy, SmallerThanFeature, SortComparisonFeature, SplittableQuantifiedFormulaFeature, StringStrategy, SumFeature, SVInstantiationCP, SVNeedsInstantiation, SymbolicExecutionStrategy, SymExStrategy, TermSmallerThanFeature, ThrownExceptionFeature, TopLevelFindFeature, TriggerVarInstantiatedFeature, TrivialMonomialLCRFeature, UseInformationFlowContractMacro.PropExpansionStrategy
Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public interface Feature
A Feature is a class that is able to compute the cost of a RuleApp.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <Goal extends ProofGoal<@NonNull Goal>>
    RuleAppCost
    computeCost(RuleApp app, PosInOccurrence pos, Goal goal, MutableState mState)
    Evaluate the cost of a RuleApp.

  • Method Details

    • computeCost

      <Goal extends ProofGoal<@NonNull Goal>> RuleAppCost computeCost(RuleApp app, PosInOccurrence pos, Goal goal, MutableState mState)
      Evaluate the cost of a RuleApp.
      Parameters:
      app - the RuleApp
      pos - position where app is to be applied
      goal - the goal on which app is to be applied
      mState -

      variable bank / local storage for feature who might require to store temporary information that changes during computation, e.g.

      invalid reference 
      TermBuffer
      s
      Returns:
      the cost of the rule application expressed as a RuleAppCost object. TopRuleAppCost.INSTANCE indicates that the rule shall not be applied at all (it is discarded by the strategy).
